advert.description: The "Emma" logo and "Easter Sale Now On" promotional text are visible in the final frames before the cut to the next advertiser.
The Bissell product lineup and the slogan "A New Breed of Clean" with the website URL are displayed in the concluding moments of the advertisement.
The call to action phone number "0800 198 0198" and the "Trustworthy" rating badge are shown on screen as the ad concludes.
The main "GARNIER" logo accompanied by social media handles is displayed in the final frame before the ITV1 channel ident.
